latin: Cylindrus ingens de caelo cecidit in agros Angliae. cives curiosi accesserunt. tum operculum aperiri coepit et creaturae ex Marte emerserunt. nemo paratus erat.

questions.prompt: Where do the creatures come from?
Were the people ready for the creatures?

translation: A huge cylinder fell from the sky into the fields of England. Curious citizens approached. Then the lid began to open and creatures from Mars emerged. No one was prepared.
